name: file_access_win_susp_credential_manager_access
raw_query: any where (file.path like~ ("*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\Credentials\\*", "*\\AppData\\Roaming\\Microsoft\\Credentials\\*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\Vault\\*", "*\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Vault\\*")) and (not (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "C:\\Windows\\system32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")))
